## Problem

What engineering problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed direction

Describe the capability you want.

## Why it belongs in this project

Explain how it fits the workspace, pack, policy, or runtime model.

## Evidence or examples

Link to comparable workflows, examples, or prior art if useful.
